debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ (symmDiff M P.edgeSet).encard = M.encard + 1

failed_attempts:
let L := P.edge
  have h_nodup : L.Nodup := h.toIsPath.edge_nodup
  have h_ne : L ≠ [] := P.edge_nonempty_of_nonempty h.nonempty

  have h_count : L.countP (· ∉ M) = L.countP (· ∈ M) + 1 := by
    have h_chain := h.isAltPath.mem_matching_iff'
    have h_start := h.first_not_in
    rw [P.first_eq_head h.nonempty] at h_start
    have h_head : L.head h_ne ∉ M := fun he ↦ h_start ⟨_, P.head_mem_edge_inc_head h.nonempty he⟩
    have h_end := h.last_not_in
    rw [P.last_eq_last h.nonempty] at h_end
    have h_last : L.getLast h_ne ∉ M := fun he ↦ h_end ⟨_, P.last_mem_edge_inc_last h.nonempty he⟩
    induction L using List.induction_with_singleton_imp_cons_cons generalizing h_ne with
    | singleton x =>
      simp only [List.mem_singleton, List.getLast_singleton, List.head_cons] at h_head h_last
      simp [h_head]
      rw [List.countP_eq_zero]; simpa using h_head
    | cons_cons x y tail IH =>
      simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at h_chain
      obtain ⟨hxy, h_chain⟩ := h_chain
      rw [List.head_cons] at h_head
      have hy : y ∈ M := hxy.mp h_head
      specialize IH h_chain (by simp) (by simpa using h_last)
      simp [h_head, hy, IH]

  have hfin : E(P).Finite := List.finite_toSet L

  have h_diff : (E(P) \ M).encard = L.countP (· ∉ M) := by
    have : E(P) \ M = {e | e ∈ L ∧ e ∉ M} := by ext; simp
    rw [← Set.encard_coe_eq_encard (hfin.subset diff_subset), Set.ncard_eq_toFinset_card, this,
        ← List.toFinset_filter, List.toFinset_card_of_nodup (h_nodup.filter _), List.length_filter]

  have h_inter : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = L.countP (· ∈ M) := by
    have : M ∩ E(P) = {e | e ∈ L ∧ e ∈ M} := by ext; simp [mem_inter_iff, and_comm]
    rw [← Set.encard_coe_eq_encard (hfin.subset inter_subset_right), Set.ncard_eq_toFinset_card, this,
        ← List.toFinset_filter, List.toFinset_card_of_nodup (h_nodup.filter _), List.length_filter]

  rw [← diff_union_inter M E(P), symmDiff_def, sup_eq_union,
    encard_union_eq_add (disjoint_sdiff_inter _ _),
    encard_union_eq_add disjoint_sdiff_sdiff,
    h_diff, h_inter, h_count]
  norm_cast
  ac_rfl
